name: Basic British Sausage/ from Floyd on Britain and Ireland
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Lean pork, such as shoulder
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the lean pork finely.
2. Add minced pork fat to the mixture.
3. Season generously with salt, pepper, and a pinch each of nutmeg, cloves, mace, and thyme.
4. Mix in breadcrumbs and egg yolks until well combined.
5. Refrigerate the mixture for 30 minutes to make it easier to handle.
6. Stuff the mixture into sausage skins or coat sausages with egg and dry breadcrumbs if skins are unavailable.
7. Twist ends securely.
8. Serve grilled or fried.
